goals: Translate technical choices into cost and margin implications
Make milestone gates explicit for the program team
Expose which assumptions most change commercial viability

project_context.project_goal: Identify literature for improving naringenin production in engineered yeast.
project_context.focus_area: Program economics, milestone gating, and commercial feasibility
starter_questions: What assumptions dominate the economics of naringenin production first?
Which milestones should gate further investment in this program?
